core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Swiss Print Design x Wall Street Terminal
Content is King: Data is the hero, UI is the frame
Contrast: High-contrast borders over soft shadows
Negative Space: Density for data, breath for navigation
anti_patterns: No centered layouts for main content
No generic 'smooth' gradients - use noise or solid blocks
No soft, muddy shadows - use hard 1px borders

visual_enhancers.texture: Subtle noise overlay on the sidebar or specific hero sections to kill digital flatness
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-black/5

grids.spacing_scale: Generous: p-6 or p-8 for cards, gap-6 for grids

buttons.style: Sharp edges or minimal rounded-md (max 4px). No pills.
buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-none border border-transparent
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-secondary-foreground border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

cards.style: Flat, 1px border, no shadow by default. Hover: border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-white border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:border-transparent rounded-md h-11

layout_structure.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64, border-r border-border bg-muted/30
layout_structure.header: Sticky top, h-16, border-b border-border bg-white/80 backdrop-blur

media.icon_library: lucide-react (Default), Phosphor Icons (for Dashboard if needed)

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion sonner
CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to use the 'Swiss' color palette provided above.
FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
LAYOUT: Do not use a centered container for the app. Use a full-width layout with a max-w-screen-2xl wrapper for content.
COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn UI components to remove heavy radii. Set --radius: 0.25rem in CSS variables.
NAVIGATION: Create a 'Module Switcher' in the sidebar (like a workspace switcher) to handle the 'Cashflow Monitor' activation.
CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style them minimally. No grid lines (or very subtle). Axis lines should be muted.
AI EXPLANATION: Use a 'Sheet' (Slide-over) or a dedicated 'Insights' card for GPT-4o outputs. Do not hide it in a tooltip.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-muted-foreground has at least 4.5:1 contrast against background.
accessibility.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
